testcase.name: test_health_endpoint
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:49: in test_health_endpoint assert response.status_code == 200, f"Health check failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Health check failed: {"error": "Backend starting, please retry"} E assert 503 == 200 E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_invalid_credentials

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error status, got: 503 assert 503 in [400, 401, 500] + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_typescript_regression.py:120: in test_login_invalid_credentials assert response.status_code in [400, 401, 500], f"Expected error status, got: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected error status, got: 503 E assert 503 in [400, 401, 500] E + where 503 = <Response [503]>.status_code
